Join Our Talent Community

Stay connected by joining our network! Enter your email and tell us a bit about yourself, and we'll keep you informed about upcoming events and opportunities that match your interests.

Learn More about Careers with PacifiCorp

View All Careers

  • Environmental Respect

    PacifiCorp is the largest grid operator in the western United States, serving 2 million customers in six western states. Our bold vision for a clean, reliable, resilient energy future has set us on the path to substantially increase our renewable energy capacity, evolve our existing portfolio and expand and modernize our transmission system. In all aspects of our business, we're reducing our environmental impacts and innovating energy solutions to power a better, brighter energy future.

  • Inclusion & Belonging

    At PacifiCorp, we support a diverse and inclusive workplace that enriches the lives of our employees, enhances the communities in which we live and work, and delivers positive business results. Our company creates and maintains a diverse and inclusive workplace free of discrimination and harassment where all employees feel empowered to be our best and to do our best work together.

  • Rocky Mountain Power

    At Rocky Mountain Power, we have the privilege of serving more than 1.2 million customers in Utah, Wyoming and Idaho. Employees at Rocky Mountain Power take pride in working together to power homes and businesses in the Mountain States we call home and deliver on our promise of making the lives of our customers better every day.

  • Pacific Power

    Pacific Power serves over 783,000 customers in Oregon, Washington and California. We're proud to be a part of the communities we serve, and we’re committed to helping them thrive and keeping them strong and safe places to live and work.
